question: Design a `Book` class with private members for `title` (string), `author` (string), and `isbn` (string). Implement a public parameterized constructor to initialize these members and a public method `displayBookInfo()` to print all book details.

test_cases.input: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy,Douglas Adams,978-0345391803
test_cases.expected:
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
Author: Douglas Adams
ISBN: 978-0345391803

driver:
Book myBook("The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy", "Douglas Adams", "978-0345391803");
myBook.displayBookInfo();
errors: Missing semicolon after the class definition of 'Book'.
